items.body:
## Summary
- port the `^(kakakumag/redacted)\.com/` rule for 価格.comマガジン from `items_all.json` into `resources/fullfeed/plus.json`
- use the live article body selector `div.article-edit` and remove embedded `script` tags after extraction
- remove the migrated legacy LDRFullFeed rule from `items_all.json`
- record the migration in `.github/port.md`

## Why
The site is reachable and the legacy XPath-era rule was still the first unported candidate. Migrating it to `plus.json` keeps the package's maintained rule set current and selector-based.

## Notes
- confirmed the top page `(kakakumag.com/redacted) is reachable
- inspected a live article page and verified `div.article-edit` contains the article body
- ran `vendor/bin/testbench fullfeed:sort`, `composer run test`, and `composer run lint`

## Breaking changes
None.
items.title: Port kakakumag fullfeed rule
